_doc: Per-linija okusni/pairing profil (plan 2026-07-21). Ključ: "<Brend>::<linija>". flavorTags SAMO iz KNOWN_TAGS/COMPLEMENTS. Nepoznato = nema unosa. strength/body 1–5.

note.hr: Puna snaga s Jalapa ligerom: kava i tamna čokolada, cedar i začini, uz pečene orašaste note.
note.en: Full-bodied Jalapa-ligero blend: coffee and dark chocolate, cedar and spice, with roasted-nut depth.

note.hr: Nikaragvanski puro s bogatim zemljano-kakao profilom, espresso i kožom; CA bilježi i karamelu te suho voće.
note.en: Nicaraguan puro with earthy cocoa, espresso and leather; CA notes also cite caramel and dried fruit.

note.hr: Srednje–puno tijelo: zemlja, espresso i začini uz kakao i crni papar na Nicaraguan Oscuro omotu.
note.en: Medium-full: earth, espresso and spice with cocoa and black pepper under a Nicaraguan Oscuro wrapper.

pairing.hr: Bourbon ili srednje jaki rum; crna kava.
pairing.en: Bourbon or medium rum; black coffee.

note.hr: Dominikanski puro: cedar i začini, espresso i kakao, koža; srednje–puno tijelo s dugim finishom.
note.en: Dominican puro: cedar and spice, espresso and cocoa, leather; medium-full to full with a long finish.

pairing.hr: Cognac XO ili stari rum; espresso.
pairing.en: XO cognac or aged rum; espresso.

note.hr: Kamerunski omot: orašasto (pekan), slatki začini (gingersnap) i citrus; medium do medium-full (CA).
note.en: Cameroon wrapper: nutty (pecan), sweet baking spice and citrus; medium to medium-full (CA).

pairing.hr: Cognac VSOP ili speyside; espresso medium.
pairing.en: VSOP cognac or Speyside; medium espresso.

note.hr: Blago–srednje: cedar, orašasto i kremasto s paprom i citrusnim rubom (Ecuador CT Shade).
note.en: Mild-medium: cedar, nuts and cream with pepper and a citrus edge (Ecuador CT Shade).

pairing.en: Light rum or milky coffee; sparkling wine.

note.hr: Honduraški Corojo: papar, zemlja i koža uz kakao; medium-full (CA).
note.en: Honduran Corojo: pepper, earth and leather with cocoa; medium-full (CA).

pairing.en: Rye whiskey or Jamaican rum; espresso.

note.hr: Najblaža Davidoff linija: kremasto, cedar i blagi orašasti/cvjetni tonovi.
note.en: Davidoff’s mildest line: creamy cedar with soft nutty and floral tones.

pairing.en: Flat white / milky coffee; sparkling wine.

note.hr: CT Shade Dominican: kremasto, cedar, badem/kava; blago–srednje (brand tasting notes).
note.en: CT Shade Dominican: cream, cedar, almond/coffee bean; mild–medium (brand tasting notes).

pairing.hr: Cognac VS ili speyside-fruity; filter-light kava.
pairing.en: VS cognac or fruity Speyside; light filter coffee.

note.hr: Full: cedar, espresso, crni papar, zemlja i koža (Ashton VSG brand notes).
note.en: Full: cedar, espresso bean, black pepper, earth and leather (Ashton VSG brand notes).

pairing.en: Bourbon or XO cognac; dark espresso.

note.hr: Puno tijelo: tamna čokolada, espresso, crni papar, zemlja i koža; duže odležani duhan.
note.en: Full: dark chocolate, espresso, black pepper, earth and leather; longer-aged leaf.

pairing.en: Aged rum or Islay Scotch; espresso.

note.hr: Srednje–puno: kakao, kava, orašasto i cedar uz kremastu ravnotežu.
note.en: Medium-full: cocoa, coffee, nuts and cedar with a creamy balance.

pairing.en: Bourbon or Demerara rum; medium espresso.

note.hr: Klasični full puro: zemlja, papar i koža, uz kakao/espresso; brand ga opisuje kao ultra robustan.
note.en: Classic full puro: earth, pepper and leather with cocoa/espresso; brand bills it as ultra-robust.

pairing.en: Bourbon or navy-strength rum; dark espresso.

note.hr: Habano oscuro: papar, tamni kakao, espresso, koža i zemlja; medium-full do full.
note.en: Habano oscuro: pepper, dark cocoa, espresso, leather and earth; medium-full to full.

note.hr: Sun-grown Nicaraguan puro: kakao, začini (muškat), cedar i kremasta slatkoća; medium do medium-full.
note.en: Sun-grown Nicaraguan puro: cocoa, baking spice, cedar and creamy sweetness; medium to medium-full.

pairing.hr: Srednji rum ili cognac VSOP; espresso-medium.
pairing.en: Medium rum or VSOP cognac; medium espresso.

note.hr: CT Broadleaf maduro: kakao, espresso, zemlja, koža i papar; full body (Foundation).
note.en: CT Broadleaf maduro: cocoa, espresso, earth, leather and pepper; full body (Foundation).

pairing.en: Cask-strength bourbon or stout; dark espresso.

note.hr: Srednje tijelo: cedar, pečeni orašasti, zemlja i blagi začini uz prirodnu slatkoću.
note.en: Medium: cedar, roasted nuts, earth and gentle spice with natural sweetness.

pairing.hr: Bourbon ili crno pivo; filter-dark kava.
pairing.en: Bourbon or dark beer; dark filter coffee.

note.hr: Ecuador Sumatra bundle: kava, cedar, orašasto i blagi začini; medium (J.C. Newman).
note.en: Ecuador Sumatra bundle: coffee, cedar, nuts and light spice; medium (J.C. Newman).

note.hr: Lot 23 Connecticut (brand): kremasto, cedar i med; mild–medium. (Sun Grown/Maduro su zasebne varijante.)
note.en: Lot 23 Connecticut (brand): creamy cedar and honey; mild–medium. (Sun Grown/Maduro are separate wrappers.)

note.hr: Blago: kremasto, cedar, blaga vanilija i orašasto; namjerno bez ligerа.
note.en: Mild: cream, cedar, soft vanilla and nuts; deliberately ligero-light.

note.hr: Ecuador CT: kremasto, cedar i orašasto s blagim začinom; mild–medium.
note.en: Ecuador CT: creamy cedar and nuts with light spice; mild–medium.

pairing.en: VSOP cognac or sparkling; light filter coffee.

note.hr: Sumatra Classic: kava, orašasto i cedar uz kremasti finish; medium (CI).
note.en: Sumatra Classic: coffee, nuts and cedar with a creamy finish; medium (CI).

note.hr: Nicaraguan Habano original: kakao, espresso, zemlja i papar; medium-full.
note.en: Nicaraguan Habano original: cocoa, espresso, earth and pepper; medium-full.

note.hr: CT Broadleaf maduro: kakao, kava, zemlja i koža; medium–full (Altadis).
note.en: CT Broadleaf maduro: cocoa, coffee, earth and leather; medium–full (Altadis).

note.hr: CT Shade Honduras sa slatkim vrhom: blago, kremasto, cedar/orašasto uz blagi kakao.
note.en: CT Shade Honduras with sweetened tip: mild, creamy cedar/nuts with soft cocoa.

pairing.hr: Kava s mlijekom ili lagani rum.

note.hr: Ecuador Habano: cedar, koža, kava i papar uz orašastu kremastost; medium.
note.en: Ecuador Habano: cedar, leather, coffee and pepper with nutty creaminess; medium.

note.hr: Ecuador CT Honduras: kremasto, cedar, blagi orašasti; mild–medium (Altadis).
note.en: Ecuador CT Honduras: creamy cedar and soft nuts; mild–medium (Altadis).

note.hr: Dominikanski Classic CT: kremasto, orašasto i cedar uz blage začine; mild–medium.
note.en: Dominican Classic CT: creamy nuts and cedar with light spice; mild–medium.

pairing.en: VS cognac or light filter coffee.

note.hr: CT Shade Dominican: vrlo blago, kremasto i cedar s kratkim finishom.
note.en: CT Shade Dominican: very mild, creamy cedar with a short finish.

note.hr: Ecuador Habano: kakao, kava, toast/orašasto i cedar; medium–full (Altadis/Omar Ortez).
note.en: Ecuador Habano: cocoa, coffee, toast/nuts and cedar; medium–full (Altadis/Omar Ortez).

note.hr: Dominican Estate Sun Grown: cedar, graham/kakao, melasa i crni papar; medium-full (brand).
note.en: Dominican Estate Sun Grown: cedar, graham/cocoa, molasses and black pepper; medium-full (brand).

note.hr: Habano: cedar, crni papar, kakao i zemlja; medium-full.
note.en: Habano: cedar, black pepper, cocoa and earth; medium-full.

note.hr: Trostruki maduro: tamna čokolada, espresso, papar i zemlja; full (CA/recenzije).
note.en: Triple maduro: dark chocolate, espresso, pepper and earth; full.

note.hr: San Andrés: tamna čokolada, badem, espresso, papar i trag kokosa (brand).
note.en: San Andrés: dark chocolate, almond, espresso, black pepper and a hint of coconut (brand).

note.hr: Core CT Broadleaf: kakao, cedar, kava i melasa; medium (Holt's/Ashton LADC).
note.en: Core CT Broadleaf: cocoa, cedar, coffee and molasses; medium.

note.hr: Srednje: kremasto, cedar, orašasto i blaga kava; elegantan Aniversario profil.
note.en: Medium: creamy cedar, nuts and soft coffee; elegant Aniversario profile.

pairing.en: VSOP cognac or sparkling; medium espresso.

note.hr: Organski nikaragvanski puro: slatki začini, cedar, kakao i espresso; mild–medium do medium.
note.en: Organic Nicaraguan puro: baking spice, cedar, cocoa and espresso; mild–medium to medium.

pairing.en: Speyside or VSOP cognac; medium filter coffee.

note.hr: Ecuador CT Champagne: kremasto, cedar, med i orašasto; mild–medium (brand).
note.en: Ecuador CT Champagne: creamy cedar, honey and nuts; mild–medium (brand).

note.hr: San Andrés: koža, kava, orašasto i papar uz kakao; medium-full (CA).
note.en: San Andrés: leather, coffee, walnut and pepper with cocoa; medium-full (CA).

note.hr: CT Broadleaf: zemlja i espresso (brand); CA bilježi kakao, kožu i suho voće; medium-full do full.
note.en: CT Broadleaf: earth and espresso (brand); CA notes cocoa, leather and dried fruit; medium-full to full.

note.hr: Family Reserve Maduro profil: tamni kakao, crna kava, zemlja i blagi papar; medium-full do full.
note.en: Family Reserve maduro profile: dark cocoa, black coffee, earth and mild pepper; medium-full to full.

note.hr: Kamerunski Serie G: slatki začini, kakao i kava uz zemljastu bazu; medium (CA).
note.en: Cameroon Serie G: sweet spice, cocoa and coffee over an earthy base; medium (CA).

pairing.en: VSOP cognac or Speyside; medium espresso.

note.hr: Ecuador Habano JC Newman: papar, koža, zemlja i orašasto; medium-full do full.
note.en: Ecuador Habano JC Newman: pepper, leather, earth and nuts; medium-full to full.

note.hr: Ecuador Habano rosado: papar pa kakao i voćne note; medium-full (My Father).
note.en: Ecuador Habano rosado: pepper then cocoa and fruit; medium-full (My Father).

note.hr: Ecuador CT Dominican: kremasto, cedar i orašasto; mild–medium (Davidoff).
note.en: Ecuador CT Dominican: creamy cedar and nuts; mild–medium (Davidoff).

note.hr: Brazilski omot Cuban-sandwich: orašasto, drvo i blagi začini; mild (Holt's).
note.en: Brazilian-wrapper Cuban sandwich: nuts, wood and light spice; mild (Holt's).

note.hr: Habano Oscuro: tamna čokolada, espresso, koža i papar uz tamno voće (Crowned Heads).
note.en: Habano Oscuro: dark chocolate, espresso, leather and pepper with dark fruit (Crowned Heads).

pairing.en: Bourbon or navy rum; dark espresso.

note.hr: Maduro: kakao, butterscotch/karamela, cedar i papar; medium-full (Holt's).
note.en: Maduro: cocoa, butterscotch/caramel, cedar and pepper; medium-full (Holt's).

note.hr: Ecuador CT Shade: kremasto, cedar i orašasto; mild–medium (J.C. Newman).
note.en: Ecuador CT Shade: creamy cedar and nuts; mild–medium (J.C. Newman).

note.hr: CT Shade Brick House: kremasto, cedar i orašasto; mild–medium.
note.en: CT Shade Brick House: creamy cedar and nuts; mild–medium.

pairing.en: VS cognac or light filter coffee.

note.hr: Ecuador CT: kremasto, cedar, orašasto i cimet/vanilija; mild–medium (CA).
note.en: Ecuador CT: creamy cedar, nuts and cinnamon/vanilla; mild–medium (CA).

pairing.en: VS cognac or light filter coffee.

note.hr: CT Shade Dominican: cedar, badem, toast i kava; medium (Holt's).
note.en: CT Shade Dominican: cedar, almond, toast and coffee; medium (Holt's).

note.hr: Decade: kakao, kava, papar i zemlja; medium-full.
note.en: Decade: cocoa, coffee, pepper and earth; medium-full.

note.hr: Klasični kubanski Romeo: srednje tijelo s cedarom, orašastim i blagim cvjetnim notama uz kremastu teksturu.
note.en: Classic Cuban Romeo: medium body with cedar, nutty and soft floral notes over a creamy texture.

pairing.en: VSOP cognac or medium filter coffee.

note.hr: Serie D (npr. No.4): srednje–puno; cedar, kava, zemlja i začini uz kakao.
note.en: Serie D (e.g. No.4): medium-full; cedar, coffee, earth and spice with cocoa.

note.hr: Kućni Partagás profil: zemlja, cedar i začini, kava i koža; tipično srednje–puno.
note.en: House Partagás profile: earth, cedar and spice with coffee and leather; typically medium-full.

note.hr: Epicure (No.2): kremasti cedar i kakao, orašasto i blagi začini; medium.
note.en: Epicure (No.2): creamy cedar and cocoa, nuts and gentle spice; medium.

note.hr: Klasični Hoyo: cedar i kremasta tekstura, orašasto i blaga zemlja; medium.
note.en: Classic Hoyo: cedar and cream, nuts and soft earth; medium.

note.hr: Línea 1492 / Siglo: kremasti cedar i kava, koža i orašasto; medium.
note.en: Línea 1492 / Siglo: creamy cedar and coffee, leather and nuts; medium.

note.hr: Klasični Upmann (npr. Magnum 46): cedar i kremasto, orašasto/med i blago cvjetno; medium.
note.en: Classic Upmann (e.g. Magnum 46): cedar and cream, nuts/honey and soft floral; medium.

pairing.en: VSOP cognac or medium filter coffee.

note.hr: Klasični Montecristo (npr. No.2): cedar, kava i zemlja, kakao i orašasto; medium-full.
note.en: Classic Montecristo (e.g. No.2): cedar, coffee and earth, cocoa and nuts; medium-full.

note.hr: Bolívar core (npr. Belicosos Finos): puno tijelo — zemlja, espresso, kakao, koža i papar.
note.en: Bolívar core (e.g. Belicosos Finos): full — earth, espresso, cocoa, leather and pepper.

pairing.hr: Peated Scotch ili espresso; stari rum.
pairing.en: Peated Scotch or espresso; aged rum.

note.hr: Suvremena Trinidad produkcija: cedar i kremasto, orašasto i začini uz kavu; medium-full.
note.en: Current Trinidad production: cedar and cream, nuts and spice with coffee; medium-full.

note.hr: Nikaragvanski puro, medium: cedar, tostirani orasi, kava i kakao uz kremastu teksturu.
note.en: Nicaraguan puro, medium: cedar, toasted nuts, coffee and cocoa with a creamy texture.

pairing.en: Medium rum or medium filter coffee.

note.hr: Nikaragvanski puro, medium-full: papar, cedar, kakao i pržena kava uz orašasto.
note.en: Nicaraguan puro, medium-full: pepper, cedar, cocoa and roasted coffee with nuts.

note.hr: Ecuador CT / Dominikana, mild–medium: kremasto, cedar, badem, blaga zemlja i espresso.
note.en: Ecuador CT / Dominican, mild–medium: cream, cedar, almond, soft earth and espresso.

note.hr: Ecuador CT: graham/cedar, koža i papar uz kremasto i orašasto; medium (Holt's/CA).
note.en: Ecuador CT: graham/cedar, leather and pepper with cream and nuts; medium (Holt's/CA).

note.hr: Gran Reserva (Cameroon u katalogu): cedar i kremasto, orašasto uz blagi papar/začine; mild–medium.
note.en: Gran Reserva (Cameroon in catalog): cedar and cream, nuts with mild pepper/spice; mild–medium.

pairing.en: VS cognac or light filter coffee.

note.hr: CT Shade Charter Oak: kremasto, cedar, cashew/badem i vanilija; mild–medium (CA 93).
note.en: CT Shade Charter Oak: cream, cedar, cashew/almond and vanilla; mild–medium (CA 93).

pairing.en: Light filter coffee or VS cognac.

note.hr: Ecuador CT: badem/cashew, cedar i coffee bean uz buttercream; mild–medium (Holt's).
note.en: Ecuador CT: almond/cashew, cedar and coffee bean with buttercream; mild–medium (Holt's).

note.hr: Undercrown Shade: kremasto, vanilija i karamela uz cedar i blagi papar; medium (brand).
note.en: Undercrown Shade: cream, vanilla and caramel with cedar and mild pepper; medium (brand).

note.hr: San Andrés Maduro: zemljano-bogato uz slatke note, kakao/kava; medium–full (brand).
note.en: San Andrés Maduro: earthy richness with sweet undertones, cocoa/coffee; medium–full (brand).

note.hr: 30th Maduro: kakao/espresso, papar, cedar i zemlja; medium–medium-full.
note.en: 30th Maduro: cocoa/espresso, pepper, cedar and earth; medium–medium-full.

note.hr: 30th Sun Grown: hrast, badem, cayenne/papar, koža; medium–full (Holt's).
note.en: 30th Sun Grown: oak, almond, cayenne/pepper, leather; medium–full (Holt's).

note.hr: Ecuador CT / Nikaragva: kremasto i drvenasto (cedar), blago orašasto; mild–medium (Oliva).
note.en: Ecuador CT / Nicaragua: creamy wood (cedar) with soft nuttiness; mild–medium (Oliva).

pairing.en: Light filter coffee or VS cognac.
